description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat green roof, featuring solar panels and a rooftop garden area. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one single-story and one two-story, connected by a covered carport. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored materials, likely wood or concrete, and large windows provide ample natural light to the interior. The property is surrounded by manicured trees and hedges, with a paved driveway leading to the carport and main entrance. Outdoor seating and a wooden deck are visible, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a strong emphasis on integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with solar panels, large windows, and a rooftop garden, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, and a row of trees lining the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop garden, solar panels, and the linear arrangement of trees along the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two-story section, carport, and the driveway extending alongside the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green roof, rear facade, and dense tree coverage on one side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
